steps.t: Glorfindel can be found outside the Last Homely House to the south-east, looking out on the Falls of Imladris. Elrond has asked you to speak with Glor…
Delossad is south-west of Rivendell in Tâl Bruinen, east of Garbert's cottage. Glorfindel has asked that you question Narmeleth in Delossad.
